creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #3)

IIRC, the handbook once upon a time suggested it.
Now it doesn't anymore, but it still lists it among other.

It isn't actively mantained, perhaps, but maybe it just doesn't need such a maintenance since it just works.

This is just a glitch that can easily be fixed, so I see no reason not to do it.
